Transcrição Completa: 11 Sell Funnels

 

Conversa

 

[00:00]"There's a lot of different businesses out there that have absolutely horrible representation of themselves online. The concept of a marketing funnel is quite simple to understand."

 

[00:10]"It's a series of landing pages that have specific intentions to either demonstrate a service, collect leads, get people to opt in for a notification of a product getting discounted, to sign up for an email list, even just a video sequence can be created into a set of landing pages that can be tied together called a funnel."

 

[00:30] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Marketing Funnel Components"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Conceito de funil de marketing com múltiplos componentes: landing pages sequenciais, demonstração de serviços, captura de leads, opt-ins para descontos, listas de email, sequências de vídeo

 

[00:32]"Usually, a funnel has a lot of components to it, but just to keep it relatively simple and to give you some clear examples, I use clickfunnels.com. The funnel builder itself is fantastic. It's fast."

 

[00:45] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "ClickFunnels vs WordPress Performance"

 

NÚMEROS: 900% mais rápido

 

VISUAL: Comparação de velocidade de desenvolvimento: ClickFunnels superando WordPress em 9x, evidências de suporte, análise de custo-benefício

 

[00:47]"There's all kinds of supporting evidence out there that shows you the cost difference and the turnaround speed. I've quantified this in my agency operations. We have a 900% faster turnaround time building funnels comparatively to building WordPress."

 

[01:03]"And I know a lot of you guys who have a specific bias towards WordPress are probably going to be like, well, you know, WordPress gets better search engine optimization and whatever else you want to justify it as. And that's cool."

 

[01:15]"You know, if you want to spend the additional cost on developers, if you want to spend the additional time, more importantly than anything else in development, then yeah, sell WordPress pages. There's no disadvantage to that if you've mastered that process for yourself."

 

[01:30]"There's a lot of people out there who don't have as many team players or as great of contractors or as high of skilled contractors that can turn around WordPress development sites as fast as you can turn around a funnel page."

 

[01:42] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Funnel Builder Comparison"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Comparação entre plataformas: ClickFunnels vs Instapage, Lead Pages, Optypress - destaque para investimento financeiro e recursos de desenvolvimento

 

[01:44]"So, to be clear, clickfunnels.com, it's a tool I use. The reason I use them over all the other funnel builders out there like Instapage, Lead Pages, Optypress, and all that is because ClickFunnels has the most money."

 

[01:57]"When you have the most money in the marketplace, you can invest in more developers, more support, bigger communities all around. I find Clickfunnels has just better usage."

 

[02:08] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "ADA Case Study Introduction"

 

NÚMEROS: #1 posição orgânica no Google para "dentist"

 

VISUAL: Busca no Google, resultado orgânico da American Dental Association em primeiro lugar, página "BA dentist"

 

[02:10]"So, without just sitting here and talking about ClickFunnels, this specific pitch video, I am going to be pitching the ADA, which is the American Dental Association, on why they need to build a funnel, and why they should add that into their current marketing process."

 

[02:26]"Especially since when I Googled the word dentist, the first organic ranked page was BA dentist from the American Dental Association."

 

[02:34] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "ADA Current Website Analysis"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Página WordPress da ADA: conteúdo curto, múltiplos links para outros sites WordPress, estilo blog old school, banner ads de concorrentes, monetização via ads

 

[02:36]"When I clicked on it, it's pretty much a short form piece of content with several links to other WordPress built websites and it's just, you know, it's very blog old school. You know, they got banner ads in different places. Their competitors could advertise to them on this."

 

[02:53]"And the person who likely built this being the ADA, they're probably making the ad money back from this more than anything else. And on top of that, they're probably making some referral money, of course, getting people signed up to be a dentist for wherever they're referring people over to."

 

[03:08]"So, long story short, this is a perfect code video pitch for how to sell a funnel. And my example here is the ADA, the American Dental Association. So, here we go."

 

[03:18]"Hey, what's going on? My name is Jeremy, and I know there's a lot of people a part of your team, of course, so I don't necessarily know who I'm talking to, but nonetheless, this is a valuable video."

 

[03:30]"If it's in the hands of a decision maker, this is going to make you guys more money. It's going to drive you more leads, and I'd love to be the person that does what I'm about to talk about hands-on for you."

 

[03:40]"I'm also willing to consult and skill transfer and knowledge transfer into your existing staff."

 

[03:46] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "ADA Current Performance"

 

NÚMEROS: #1 posição orgânica para "dentist"

 

VISUAL: Resultado de busca do Google mostrando ADA em primeiro lugar, análise de potencial não explorado

 

[03:48]"You guys have a lot of potential right now and I'm sure that you're already making a lot of money and driving a lot of leads. When I Googled the word dentist, you guys were the first one to show up in the organic search engine results."

 

[04:00]"And when I clicked on your page, I noticed it was built on WordPress. And, you know, not to say you're doing anything wrong, not to point out anything in a criticizing way, just to say there's a lot more money to make. There's a lot more leads to be made than there likely are right now."

 

[04:18] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Funnel Concept Introduction"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Conceito de funnel: ranking em motores de busca, facilidade de desenvolvimento, velocidade de criação, facilidade de modificação

 

[04:20]"I want to introduce you to the concept of what's called a funnel. So, funnels can still rank extremely high in the search engines, just as great as WordPress sites. They're much easier to develop. They're much faster to develop. And in addition to that, they're much easier to make changes to."

 

[04:38] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "WordPress Development Problems"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Problemas do WordPress: processo lento de mudanças, necessidade de submeter requests para equipe de desenvolvimento, tempo de espera, custos adicionais por mudanças simples

 

[04:40]"A lot of the problems with working with common web development companies is they take forever to make simple changes. If I wanted to make a simple change to this page to add an additional graphic, to update this thing right here, or to even just change some of the simple text, I have to submit a request to a development team."

 

[04:58]"I then have to wait for however long it takes for them to turn that change around. And in addition to that, they're likely going to charge me for such a simple change because it's a time intensive service that they're selling and it requires effort on their end. And of course, they're likely not going to do that for free."

 

[05:17] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "WordPress Historical Issues"

 

NÚMEROS: Mid 2000s, Late 2010s

 

VISUAL: Timeline de problemas do WordPress: contratação de desenvolvedores internos, trabalho full-time em manutenção, plugins que quebram o sistema, instabilidade, fundação inferior

 

[05:19]"Sometimes this happened more in the mid 2000s in the late 2010s than any other time. People got upsold just like you into either hiring web developers into their business internally to just sit around and work on these things all day because they require so much time intensive development on the back end just to keep them updated."

 

[05:40]"WordPress has all these different plugins and you know if one of them updates that could break everything else and it's so unstable and it's such an inferior cracky foundation to build on top of especially nowadays for all the competitors that are out there that have a 900% faster turnaround time using tools like clickfunnels.com using tools like leadpages.net."

 

[06:05] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Agency Performance Comparison"

 

NÚMEROS: 20+ staff members, 900% mais rápido, 10 out of 10 comparações

 

VISUAL: Comparação de agência: 20+ funcionários, ClickFunnels vencendo 10/10 vezes, custo mais baixo, 900% mais rápido que WordPress

 

[06:07]"I'm going to show you some of these things. So, in my agency, I had over 20 different staff working on things just like this. And when we would compare the two of which one could get done faster, 10 out of 10. Clickfunnels was cheaper in cost and it was a 900% faster turnaround time than it was to develop something on WordPress."

 

[06:27] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "ClickFunnels Editor Interface"

 

NÚMEROS: 3-5 cliques para edição

 

VISUAL: Interface do editor ClickFunnels: template builder, edição com poucos cliques, mudanças instantâneas de gráficos, headlines, vídeos, botão save

 

[06:29]"And here's the best part. If we wanted to go in and make just a simple change to a graphic, to a headline, we can click into it with literally maybe three to five clicks and logging into the software itself. All of a sudden, we're in this template builder here where we have the opportunity just to go in and boop, make a simple change, press save, and we're gone."

 

[06:51]"If we want to change a video out, it's as simple as clicking on it, swapping out where that link goes, and boom, we're done."

 

[06:57] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "ClickFunnels Integration Capabilities"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Integrações disponíveis: CRMs comuns, processadores de pagamento, softwares de geração de leads, plataformas de email marketing

 

[06:59]"We also have the functionality to integrate it into every common CRM software, and a bunch of other cool stuff. Payment processors, lead generation softwares. You can actually link email marketing right into this thing. There's a bunch of cool stuff you could do."

 

[07:14] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Funnel Series Concept"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Conceito de série de landing pages agrupadas com intenções específicas ou múltiplas, processo sequencial

 

[07:16]"So anyway, the concept of a funnel is like having a series of landing pages that are grouped together with one specific intention or multiple intentions depending on what you want to do."

 

[07:26] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "ADA Current Content Structure"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Página da ADA atual: história introduzindo estudantes, estudo dental específico, showcases de casos de estudantes, botão "learn how", link para "become a dentist", histórias de férias de verão

 

[07:28]"So as an example, if I wanted to become a dentist, what I could do is have a page specifically giving people a piece of advice or whatever piece of information. As an example, you have a story that introduces the students. You guys have a specific dental study. It looks like here, you guys show case studies for students that have gone through these different programs."

 

[07:48]"And on top of that, you have a specific learn how button that's linked to become a dentist and what people did on their summer vacations to do so."

 

[07:56] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Modern Page Requirements"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Falta de elementos visuais modernos, necessidade de: captura de leads, agendamento em calendários, venda direta de serviços/produtos, processadores de pagamento integrados

 

[07:58]"But to be clear, there's not a lot of visuals that are tied into this process. People nowadays are representing themselves with more modern pages that can collect leads that can get people scheduled into different calendars and more importantly can sell services and products directly online as I said linked to different payment processors."

 

[08:20]"All with the ability to not get upsold on your end to having to pay these web developers all this all the service costs that we do and in addition to that you don't have to have all the time to make simple changes to drive more leads and make more money when you figure out ways to do so."

 

[08:37] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Jeremy's DMM Funnel Example"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Página de exemplo construída em ClickFunnels: preview de curso gratuito chamado "DMM", formulário de opt-in, integração automática com email marketing e CRM

 

[08:39]"So, some examples of that. Here's an example of a funnel. This guy here, his name is Jeremy. He's given away a preview to one of his courses and it's called the DMM. And check this out. When this guy, you can see here, this entire page is built on this platform called Clickfunnels."

 

[08:57]"And if you enter in your information here, what happens is you automatically become a lead that links to his email marketing platform. So now that information is in a CRM database. In addition to that, the person's getting emailed now and it's all linked inside of one tool called Clickfunnels."

 

[09:15]"It's much cheaper than what it is to develop WordPress sites. And it's much more stable because it's all in one system rather than having a bunch of different plugins that could break everything if one of them updates or even worse if one of them just stops getting developed and stop being supported by the people who created it."

 

[09:33] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Multi-Step Funnel Strategy"

 

NÚMEROS: 11 vídeos gratuitos, curso de $1,000

 

VISUAL: Funil de 2 etapas: Step 1 - 11 vídeos gratuitos (preview do curso de $1k), Step 2 - webinar training sobre agência de marketing, página de thank you customizada

 

[09:35]"Now check this out. Rather than just sending people to a generic page that says, 'Hey, thank you for your contact information.' This is the whole point of a funnel. The first step was to get 11 videos at no cost to the person, a preview of his thousand course."

 

[09:51]"And then the second step here is to get people into a webinar training where he further talks about the opportunity that he's pitching people on to start and scale a marketing agency."

 

[10:02] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "ClickFunnels Backend Organization"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Interface backend do ClickFunnels: múltiplos steps facilmente organizados, criação de páginas baseada em intenção, estrutura visual clara

 

[10:04]"So right here at step number two in the funnel, here's how this looks on the back end. It has multiple steps, easily organized, and when you create a page, it's based on the intention of the page."

 

[10:15] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Page Type Categories"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Tipos de página disponíveis: opt-in pages, sales pages, video explainer pages, video salesletter pages, organizadas por categoria

 

[10:17]"So, as an example, if I just create a step here as a test, I'll show you exactly what I mean. We have opt-in pages, we have sales pages, we have video explainer pages, we have video salesletter pages. And it's all broke down into these different categories."

 

[10:32] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Template Marketplace"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Marketplace de templates: exemplos prontos para cada tipo de página, possibilidade de customização para marca, opção de começar do zero, templates com alta taxa de conversão comprovada

 

[10:34]"And the cool part about this is as soon as you choose whatever page type is best for you, they give you all these different examples here called templates that you can recreate and make specific to your brand and build on top of."

 

[10:47]"You're not limited, of course, to whatever template you could select. You could start from scratch and completely brand this thing for you. The cool part about using these templates and all the templates in their marketplace are that you get an opportunity to build off something that's already proven to work and already gets high opt-in rates and already sells things at a higher rate than what you might create yourself."

 

[11:10]"So, long story short, I think this is a great opportunity for the ADA to present themselves at a higher standard, to still rank high in the search engines, and on top of that, to be able to convert more leads faster, at a cheaper cost, and with a faster turnaround time on changes that need to be made."

 

[11:28] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "A/B Testing Capability"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Funcionalidade de duplicação de página em um clique, criação de testes A/B, comparação de variações sem mudança de URL

 

[11:30]"One of my favorite parts about ClickFunnels, as soon as you choose and finish up whatever page that you're creating, you can in one click duplicate the page and create an AB test."

 

[11:40] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "ADA Current Testing Limitations"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Página da ADA sem testes A/B: refresh não muda nada, sem variações de página, sem estatísticas de backend para comparação de conversão

 

[11:42]"So, as an example, one thing I noticed when I'm on your page here, if I just keep refreshing the page, nothing changes. There's no AB tests that are being run sending me to a different page variation and then giving you on the back end statistics about which page is converting better."

 

[11:58] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Split Testing Features"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Capacidades de split test: variações de headlines, comparação de imagens, perspectiva data-driven, mudanças simples sem alteração de URLs

 

[12:00]"So, one of my favorite parts about this tool and what we can do for you is we can easily create page variations and split tests to show you which headline works better, to show you which images work better, to show you with a data-driven perspective how you can make more leads and sales possible by just making little changes and comparing things on your page and easy split tests without having to change the URLs and do a bunch of fancy stuff."

 

[12:26] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Stats Dashboard"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Botão de stats: visualização de todo tráfego por página, taxas de conversão, receita gerada, lista completa de leads, vendas geradas, integração de pixels, gerenciamento de domínios

 

[12:28]"In addition to that, here's the coolest part. You can click on this stats button and you can get a view of all the traffic to each page. You can get a view of the conversion rates on each page. You can get a view of everything including the revenue generated."

 

[12:43]"And on top of that, there's just this giant list of all the people who were generated through the funnel right here. The sales that were generated. You can add your pixels from your websites easily. You can add your domains into the tool. It's so simple to use."

 

[12:58] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Funnel Sharing Feature"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Link de compartilhamento de funnel: transferência entre equipes (Seattle para Virginia), adição em diferentes contas ClickFunnels com um clique, compartilhamento entre agências e contractors, criação de backups

 

[13:00]"And on top of that, you get to share the funnel with a simple link. So, if I have some of my staff that's in Seattle that needs to send a link over to my people in Virginia, I can just with this one link right here, send it over to the other team and they can click it, boop, and add it into an entirely different ClickFunnel account with one simple click."

 

[13:20]"Which is great for sharing things between different agencies or different contractors you're working with to manage your assets better and to create duplicates of those assets as backups."

 

[13:30]"So, I think this is really cool. I think it's going to be really effective for you. I think that we can make a lot more money, drive a lot more leads into your business, really upgrade you."

 

[13:40] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Technology Evolution Analogy"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

 

VISUAL: Evolução tecnológica: HTML → WordPress (passado) → ClickFunnels (presente), padrão de upgrade lógico, mais features e funcionalidades a cada geração

 

[13:42]"You know, like back in the day before you had your WordPress site, you were probably built on HTML. And just like back then, there's more features, there's more functionality, there's higher chances for you to drive leads and sales just by once again making that decision to jump from what was working."

 

[13:58]"Just like HTML, WordPress came along and it was a logical switch. Now, Clickfunnels comes along and it's the same concept. It's a logical switch to drive more leads and more sales."

 

[14:10] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Agency Service Proposal"

 

NÚMEROS: $10,000, 3 páginas de funnel, 3 emails de follow-up

 

VISUAL: Proposta de serviço: funil de 3 páginas (opt-in form + upsell/lead capture + thank you/confirmation), 3 emails de follow-up inclusos, setup completo na conta do cliente

 

[14:12]"If you want us to build a funnel out for you, we'll build out a three-page funnel. Okay? So, that means we'll create an opt-in form. We'll create a simple upsell or a lead capture page. And then in addition to that, we'll create a third step such as a thank you page or a confirmation offer."

 

[14:30]"And we'll do that for a simple 10K investment. Now, in addition to that, we'll include three different emails that will follow up with the people who we generate as leads for you. And we'll put it all inside of your account."

 

[14:43]"So, if you want to work with us, we'd love to do that. It's a 10K investment."

 

[14:48] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Consulting Alternative Proposal"

 

NÚMEROS: $15,000

 

VISUAL: Opção de consultoria: skill transfer e knowledge transfer completo, todos os treinamentos disponíveis, compartilhamento dos melhores funnels da agência, exemplos específicos de dentistas na indústria

 

[14:50]"And in addition to that, you know, we understand a lot of people who developed inside of WordPress, instead of wanting the agency costs and the continued monthly service costs and paying for hosting and all these different upsells, you might have a team that you decided to hire in-house instead in order to make those costs a little less significant for you and a little more affordable. We understand."

 

[15:12]"We do consulting as well. For a simple 15K investment. We'll skill transfer and knowledge transfer everything we know about this tool. Give you all the trainings that we have to offer, of course."

 

[15:24]"And in addition to that, we'll share you some of our best funnels with that simple sharable funnel link that I was telling you about, some of our best converting stuff with other dentists we've worked with inside of your industry and niche."

 

[15:37] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Value Proposition Summary"

 

NÚMEROS: 900% mais rápido

 

VISUAL: Recap de benefícios: velocidade 900% superior, custos menores, melhor representação de marca, setup mais rápido, split tests, perspectiva data-driven

 

[15:39]"So, we'd love to get together. Our contact information is in the description here. And long story short, if you want to turn around websites at 900% faster rates, if you want cheaper costs, and if you want a better representation of your brand online, that's going to be able to get you up and running faster just like HTML to WordPress."

 

[16:00]"We're going to upgrade you, get you at a higher level of performance and just make things happen faster for you. And on top of that, we can run split tests and have a data driven perspective on what works and what doesn't."

 

[16:12]"So, we'd love to get started. Contact information is in the description here. We'll be following up and thank you guys for doing what you're doing. I obviously love the fact that you guys are out there generating and creating some dentists as everybody needs their teeth well maintained, right? All right. Thank you. Bye."

 

[16:30]"And anyway, that's a simple pitch on how to sell a funnel. I'll see you in the next video."

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

Velocidade de desenvolvimento: 900% mais rápido que WordPress

Equipe da agência: 20+ funcionários

Taxa de sucesso: 10 out of 10 comparações favoráveis ao ClickFunnels

Cliques para edição: 3-5 cliques

Proposta de serviço agency: $10,000

Componentes do serviço: 3 páginas de funnel + 3 emails de follow-up

Proposta de consultoria: $15,000

Posição da ADA no Google: #1 para palavra-chave "dentist"

Período histórico mencionado: Mid 2000s, Late 2010s

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

 

Conceito de Funil de Marketing:

Série de landing pages com intenções específicas

Demonstração de serviços

Captura de leads

Opt-ins para notificações de desconto

Inscrição em listas de email

Sequências de vídeo integradas

 

Vantagens do ClickFunnels sobre WordPress:

Desenvolvimento 900% mais rápido

Custos menores

Facilidade de edição (3-5 cliques)

Estabilidade superior (sem plugins que quebram)

Interface drag-and-drop intuitiva

Mudanças instantâneas sem equipe de desenvolvimento

 

Integrações Disponíveis:

CRMs comuns

Processadores de pagamento

Softwares de geração de leads

Plataformas de email marketing

Pixels de tracking

Gerenciamento de domínios

 

Tipos de Páginas Disponíveis:

Opt-in pages

Sales pages

Video explainer pages

Video salesletter pages

Thank you pages

Confirmation pages

 

Funcionalidades Avançadas:

Templates prontos com alta conversão comprovada

A/B testing em um clique

Dashboard de estatísticas completo

Tracking de tráfego por página

Métricas de taxa de conversão

Relatórios de receita gerada

Lista completa de leads e vendas

 

Compartilhamento e Colaboração:

Links de compartilhamento de funil

Transferência entre contas com um clique

Colaboração entre equipes geograficamente dispersas

Compartilhamento com agências e contractors

Criação de backups duplicados

 

Exemplo de Funil Multi-Step (Jeremy's DMM):

Step 1: Opt-in para 11 vídeos gratuitos (preview de curso de $1,000)

Step 2: Webinar training sobre start/scale de agência de marketing

Integração automática com CRM e email marketing

Thank you page customizada (não genérica)

 

Problemas do WordPress Identificados:

Processo lento de mudanças (submit request → wait → pay)

Custos adicionais por mudanças simples

Necessidade de desenvolvedores in-house full-time

Plugins que quebram quando atualizam

Instabilidade geral do sistema

Plugins que param de ser suportados

Fundação "cracky" e inferior

 

Análise da ADA (American Dental Association):

Posição #1 no Google para "dentist"

Site atual em WordPress estilo blog old school

Banner ads de concorrentes na própria página

Monetização via ads

Receita de referrals para programas de dentista

Falta de elementos visuais modernos

Sem captura de leads otimizada

Sem sistema de agendamento integrado

Sem capacidade de venda direta

Sem A/B testing implementado

 

ESTRUTURA:

 

Proposta de Serviço Agency ($10K):

Página 1: Opt-in Form

       ↓

Página 2: Upsell/Lead Capture

       ↓

Página 3: Thank You/Confirmation

       +

3 Emails de Follow-up

       +

Setup Completo na Conta do Cliente

 

Proposta de Consultoria ($15K):

Skill Transfer Completo

       +

Knowledge Transfer de Todas as Ferramentas

       +

Todos os Treinamentos Disponíveis

       +

Compartilhamento dos Melhores Funnels

       +

Exemplos Específicos da Indústria Odontológica

 

Evolução Tecnológica:

HTML (Old School)

       ↓

WordPress (Mid 2000s - Late 2010s)

       ↓

ClickFunnels (Atual)

 

Cada upgrade = Mais features + Mais funcionalidades + Mais leads/vendas

 

Razões para Escolher ClickFunnels:

Mais dinheiro no marketplace

Mais desenvolvedores

Mais suporte

Comunidades maiores

Melhor usabilidade geral

 

Comparação de Plataformas:

ClickFunnels (escolhido)

Instapage

Lead Pages

Optypress

 

Workflow de Edição:

Login (3-5 cliques)

       ↓

Template Builder

       ↓

Edição Direta (drag-and-drop)

       ↓

Save

       ↓

Live Instantaneamente

 

Capacidades de Testing:

Página Original

       ↓

Duplicar em 1 Clique

       ↓

Criar Variação

       ↓

A/B Test Automático

       ↓

Stats Dashboard

       ↓

Data-Driven Decisions

 

Dashboard de Métricas:

Tráfego por página

Taxas de conversão

Receita gerada

Lista de leads

Lista de vendas

Integração de pixels

Gerenciamento de domínios

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

 

Investimentos Propostos:

Serviço Agency Hands-On: $10,000

Inclui: 3 páginas de funnel

Inclui: 3 emails de follow-up

Inclui: Setup completo na conta

Consultoria + Knowledge Transfer: $15,000

Inclui: Skill transfer completo

Inclui: Todos os treinamentos

Inclui: Compartilhamento de melhores funnels

Inclui: Exemplos específicos da indústria

 

Economia de Custos:

Desenvolvimento: 900% mais rápido = redução drástica de custos de mão de obra

Sem custos de desenvolvedores in-house full-time

Sem custos de manutenção mensal de WordPress

Sem custos de hosting complexo

Sem custos por mudanças simples

Sem custos de plugins premium

Sem custos de correção de bugs de plugins

 

Custos Evitados (WordPress):

Desenvolvedores in-house (salário full-time)

Serviços mensais contínuos

Hosting

Upsells de plugins

Cobranças por mudanças simples

Tempo de espera = custo de oportunidade

 

ROI Implícito:

Velocidade 900% maior = 9x mais produtividade

Mesmo custo ou menor = ROI positivo imediato

Mais leads convertidos = receita adicional

Mais vendas diretas = receita adicional

A/B testing = otimização contínua de conversão

Data-driven = decisões mais lucrativas

 

Comparação de Eficiência:

10/10 comparações favoráveis ao ClickFunnels

20+ staff testando ambas plataformas

Resultado consistente: ClickFunnels sempre mais barato e rápido

 

Oportunidade da ADA:

Posição #1 orgânica já conquistada

Potencial de conversão não explorado

Monetização atual: apenas ads e referrals

Potencial com funnels: leads diretos + vendas diretas + upsells

Lifetime value não calculado atualmente

 

Estrutura de Pricing Lógica:

Consultoria ($15K) > Agency Service ($10K)

Razão: Cliente mantém conhecimento in-house

Razão: Cliente pode replicar para múltiplos projetos

Razão: Valor de longo prazo maior

 

DURAÇÃO: 16:35 FORMATO: Video pitch de vendas para serviços de construção de funnels (ClickFunnels) direcionado à American Dental Association
